title: アグネスデジタル登場！

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hiya! I'm Agnes Digital, the all-rounder-ish
Umamusume who'll run on dirt or turf just to be
side-by-side with all my oshis! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for me to make my debut, and the
news has somehow made its way to T.M. Opera O
and Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why are they worrying about me?! Ooohhh, I'm
not so sure about this race anymore!
